name: Five Fold Maitri Society (Regd.)
address: 158/11 A, Mecosbagh Colony, Near Kadbi Chowk, Nagpur, Maharashtra
description: Operating the 'Chalo Khushiyan Batein' initiative, this society ensures no one in Nagpur sleeps hungry by providing quality food and education to the underprivileged.
longDescription: Established in 2017, Five Fold Maitri Society (Regd.) is a registered non-profit trust headquartered in Nagpur. Their flagship initiative, 'Chalo Khushiyan Batein', targets the core of city-wide food insecurity. The society envisions promoting joy and contentment among individuals irrespective of caste or creed by providing access to quality food and education. They bridge the gap between food waste and hunger, ensuring that no individual in the city goes to bed hungry while instilling the essence of virtuous living.

programs.title: Monthly Langar Drives
programs.description: Large-scale free food distribution events held across major junctions and hospitals in Nagpur, providing hot, nutritious meals to thousands in a single day.

programs.title: No Waste No Hunger
programs.description: A systemic initiative to collect surplus food from weddings, catering events, and households. Our logistics team ensures this food reaches slum communities within hours safely.

programs.title: Widow Welfare Program
programs.description: Providing monthly ration kits (groceries, essentials) to widowed women in rural and semi-urban Nagpur to ensure financial and caloric security.

programs.title: Hygiene & Sanitization
programs.description: Monthly distribution of hygiene kits (soaps, masks, sanitary pads) coupled with health awareness workshops in marginalized settlements.

recentActivities.title: Large Scale Langar Drive
recentActivities.description: Massive food distribution drives providing fresh meals to thousands across Nagpur.

recentActivities.title: Ration Kits for Widows
recentActivities.description: Door-to-door distribution of dry ration and provisions to widowed families in marginalized areas.

recentActivities.title: Educational Support Kits
recentActivities.description: Distributing study material kits to children to ensure continuity in their learning process.

recentActivities.title: Hygiene & Sanitization Kit
recentActivities.description: Health awareness drives combined with the distribution of hygiene materials to slum settlements.
